title: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: A decadent chocolate dessert with a firm cake exterior and a warm, gooey, molten chocolate center.
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F). Butter and lightly flour ramekins.
Melt chocolate and butter together in a double boiler until smooth.
Whisk eggs, sugar, and vanilla in a bowl until thick and pale.
Fold the melted chocolate into the egg mixture, then gently fold in the flour and salt.
Divide batter into ramekins and bake for exactly 10-12 minutes. Invert onto a plate and serve warm.

cookingTips: For the best Chocolate Lava Cake, always use fresh, high-quality ingredients.
Do not rush the cooking process; allow the flavors to meld naturally.
Adjust the spices according to your personal taste preference.

faq.question: Can I make Chocolate Lava Cake ahead of time?
faq.answer: Yes, you can prepare the ingredients in advance, but it's best served fresh.

faq.question: How do I store the leftovers?
faq.answer: Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

faq.question: Can I freeze this dish?
faq.answer: It is generally not recommended to freeze this as it may alter the texture.
